title: oleandra undulata
intro: Oleandra undulata, also known as the Elephant Ear or Elephant's Ear Fern, is a species of fern native to tropical regions of Asia and Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating digestive issues, as well as having potential anti-cancer and anti-inflammatory properties. Herbal preparations of Oleandra undulata can be found in the form of infusions, decoctions, and topical applications, although its use and efficacy may vary depending on the region and traditional practices.
